nasb.text: They shall be double beneath, and together they shall be complete to its top to the first ring; thus it shall be with both of them: they shall form the two corners.

esv.text: they shall be separate beneath, but joined at the top, at the first ring. Thus shall it be with both of them; they shall form the two corners.

cnv.text: 木板的下截是要雙的，一直連到上面的第一環那裡，都是要雙的。兩塊都要這樣做，要成為兩隻角。

ccb.text: 木板的下端连于底座，顶端用一个环固定。两个拐角都要这样做。
